title: Which realtime tech fits your app?
meta_description: Cut 70 % of realtime infra cost by picking the right transport — WebSocket, SSE, or polling benchmarks under 500 ms latency with 2026 pricing and code examples.
prewritten_tweet:

Most of it goes to idle connections and overkill bidirectional logic.
